yesterdayAnalysis: Wednesday's session perfectly executed the taper plan: 40-minute easy ROUVY ride (TSS 22, HR 117) paired with a 0.9mi pool swim (TSS 16, HR 114). Combined TSS of 38 kept stress minimal while maintaining feel and rhythm. Heart rates stayed comfortably aerobic, exactly what's needed 10 days out from race day.
todayRecommendation: Complete today's 30-minute very easy spin as planned — this is purely about leg turnover and staying loose, not fitness. Skip the run entirely as prescribed to protect your hip and preserve freshness for race week.
weekProgress: Week 12 of 13 shows 153 TSS of 200 target (76%) with 3 days remaining including today. This is perfectly on-track for a true taper week where volume is intentionally reduced by 60%. The remaining schedule (today's easy spin, Friday rest, Saturday OWS, Sunday short run) will safely reach target while maximizing freshness for Salem.
keyInsight: Your taper discipline is excellent — all sessions executed at prescribed low intensity (HR 113-117 on bike, 111-114 swim) while bike is packed tomorrow for race week travel.
positives: Sleep rebounded to 79 score last night with 6.9h and strong REM (93min) after Tuesday's dip
